tools.name: orchestkit_docs_search
tools.description: Search the OrchestKit documentation. Use this first to find the right page for a question. Input: a query string. Returns a ranked list of pages with titles and URLs.

tools.name: orchestkit_docs_get
tools.description: Fetch one OrchestKit documentation page as Markdown. Use after orchestkit_docs_search to read a page in full. Input: the page path (e.g. '/docs/getting-started/installation'). Returns the page Markdown.
